title: LEGO | Marvel Iron Man Mark 3 Collectors' Edition Figure - Avengers Display Model Kit for Adults - incl. a Minifigure & Arc Reactor - Collectible Gift for Fans - 76344
availability_text: This item will be released on January 1, 2026.
features: IRON MAN FIGURE – Fans can indulge their passion with LEGO Marvel Iron Man Mark 3 Collectors’ Edition building set for adults, a posable display figure standing over 38 cm (15 in.) tall
SUPER HERO DISPLAY – Recreate Iron Man’s appearance in Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Infinity Saga movies with this LEGO Marvel figure, which includes an attachable Iron Man minifigure
IMMERSIVE MODEL KIT – The authentically detailed, 1,297-piece Iron Man suit also comes with an Arc Reactor, providing a satisfying reward for adult model builders
DYNAMIC DISPLAY – With jointed neck, waist, shoulders, wrists and hands, plus gold-lacquered accents, this posable LEGO Avengers figure stands on a sturdy base with a name plaque
MARVEL GIFT FOR ADULTS – This Super Hero building set makes a great birthday or any-day gift idea for men and women who are Iron Man fans or LEGO collectors
BUILD TOGETHER – The LEGO Builder app offers a guided, collaborative experience with friends and family where everyone has fun building part of the set using their own devices
MORE BUILDING SETS FOR ADULTS – The range of LEGO Sets for Adults is designed to deliver rewarding, immersive projects for adult model makers
description: From the manufacturer Iron Man building set for adults Recreate Iron Man’s appearance in the Marvel Studios’ Infinity Saga with this authentically detailed Iron Man Mark 3 armour. Designed for dynamic display Pose the authentically detailed Iron Man Mark 3 armour by positioning the jointed neck, waist, shoulders, wrists and hands. LEGO | Marvel Iron Man Mark 3 Collectors’ Edition Bring Iron Man to life The 1,297-piece building set stands over 38 cm (15 in.) tall. Jointed for dynamic display Fully articulated neck, waist, shoulders, wrists and hands. Movie-accurate design Authentic details include gold-lacquered armour plates. Power up the build The Arc Reactor completes a rewarding building experience. Impressive display piece Iron Man stands on a sturdy base with a name plaque. Attachable Iron Man minifigure The buildable Iron Man figure comes with a minifigure version. LEGO | Marvel gift for adults This building set makes a great birthday or any-day gift idea for men, women and Super Hero fans aged 18 and over.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Creative thinking, Emotional intelligence, Imagination development, Motor skills, Social skills
